layerNotes.foundation: Opaque indigo backing and perimeter seams.
layerNotes.floor-modules: Thirty-two-pixel wet-stone modules with low-contrast values.
layerNotes.boundary-architecture: Plaster, cedar, and iron masses restricted to the twelve blocked edge cells.
layerNotes.high-gallery: Flat, traversable maintenance gallery at x=0, y=2..4.
layerNotes.registry-resonator: Fictional buried administrative command machine restricted to its four blocked cells.
layerNotes.special-footings: Quiet floor anchors for encounter nodes and dry lantern footing.
layerNotes.rain-drainage: Cell-aligned drainage and subdued rain seepage.
layerNotes.surface-detail: Sparse wear marks kept away from gameplay cue colors.

construction.textureRule: integer modular pattern; no random generator
construction.symbolRule: Only asymmetric broken ledger-tab geometry; no radial, devotional, or historical heraldic emblems.
